summary: Russian forces used two FPV drones to strike a soldier hiding behind a tree. In Kharkiv region, Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish AHS Krab 155-mm self-propelled howitzer using an optical fiber FPV drone called "Provod." The "Rubikon" Center reported 114 targets destroyed on March 9, 2026, in operations across Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions, including strikes on Ukrainian personnel and FPV air defense against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs. Ukrainian forces, including Lasar’s Group from the National Guard, repelled mechanized assaults in Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions, destroying enemy tanks. Ukrainian officials stated the first group of Ukrainian experts will depart for the Middle East to train Gulf countries in countering drones, while Ukraine’s interceptor drones have become a key element of its short-range air defense against Russian Geran drones.
